mapper.select: select tt.*,wh.store_name,sn.storeroom_name,di.device_name from em_temperature tt left join em_warehouse wh on wh.store_num = tt.store_num left join em_storeroom sn on sn.storeroom_num = tt.storeroom_num left join em_device_info di on di.device_code = tt.device_code ${ew.customSqlSegment}

SELECT device.device_code AS deviceCode,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%H') AS timeValue, eh.real_value AS dataValue FROM em_temperature eh left join em_device_info device on device.device_code = eh.device_code JOIN (SELECT device_code,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00') AS hour_start,MAX(sync_time) AS last_time_per_hour FROM em_temperature WHERE company_code = #{companyCode} AND sync_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} GROUP BY device_code,DATE_FORMAT(sync_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:00:00')) grouped ON device.device_code = grouped.device_code AND eh.sync_time = grouped.last_time_per_hour ORDER BY eh.sync_time asc;
